title: OFFCUP Plant Grow Bags, 6pcs 3 Gallon Planter Bags with 100 Pcs Plant Seedling, Breathable Nonwoven Fabric Pots Tomato Plant Container with Handles for Vegetable Flower Plant Fruits (Black)
features: 🌱【Premium Quality】6-pack plant bags, 3 gallons, and 100pcs seedling bags; Made of high-quality non-woven material, with reinforced seams, no need to worry about the flower pots breaking or cracking. Our plant bags are more sturdy and durable, and can effectively solve the problems of water accumulation and water loss;

🌱【Handle Design】Thickened nylon handles, double-stitched, comfortable to hold, durable and safe, can be used to move plants around the garden, deck, patio or porch, reducing the risk of transplant shock, easy to fold and store. You can also adjust the spacing and angle of plants according to the habits of different plants to make them grow better;

🌱【Breathable Bottom】Plant bags are especially suitable for patios, balconies and gardens with limited space. They promote the growth of strong roots and avoid root entanglement that may occur when planting in plastic pots. This allows plants to grow faster and produce more abundant fruits. The good drainage of the bag prevents water accumulation and root rot, greatly improving the survival rate of plants and preventing insect infestation.

🌱【Reusable】Plant bags can be used in all seasons. Potato planting bags are very easy to clean, can be folded up and placed in a dry, cool place, and do not take up too much space when stored, and can be reused continuously.

🌱【Widely used】Great for planting on balconies and terraces, and can also be used as storage bags to store dirty clothes, packing tools, etc. It is very suitable for growing a variety of vegetables, fruits, flowers and herbs, such as potatoes, tomatoes, garlic, onions, strawberries, radishes, peanuts, etc.
description: Product Description Excellent drainage The permeable fabric can balance the soil moisture. Air circulation and good drainage. You don't have to worry about overwatering. Reusable planting bags After each growing season, wash, dry, fold and store the bags for later use. Good air circulation Prevents root entanglement, making the roots healthier, root growth stronger, and improving nutrient absorption.
